scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:package && pnpm run build:extension-assets
scripts.build:extension-assets: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/extension/offscreen', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('extension/manifest.json', 'dist/extension/manifest.json'); fs.copyFileSync('dist/bridge/translate.js', 'dist/extension/translate.js'); fs.copyFileSync('extension/offscreen/keepalive.html', 'dist/extension/offscreen/keepalive.html');"
scripts.demo:python: pnpm run build && cd client/python && uv run python demo.py
scripts.demo:go: pnpm run build && (cd client/go && go run .)
